The MFCC encoder takes in MFCCs and their first- and second-order derivatives to learn latent feature sequences.

The Chroma encoder transforms Chroma CENS features into DCB-dimensional sequences based on localized inter-dependencies.
Concatenated audio features include the learned latent features from MFCCs (AMB) and Chroma (ACB).
Audio features (AB) combine both AMB and ACB dimensions.
